_comment: Template for ugit's /config.json. Lives at device root. ugit reads this to (a) connect Wi-Fi and (b) pull firmware updates from a GitHub repo. Copy to /config.json on the device and fill in real values. Never commit a real /config.json -- it contains secrets.
_token_comment: Empty for public repos. For private repos, use a fine-grained PAT scoped to read-only access on this single repo.
_ignore_comment: Paths ugit should NOT pull from GitHub AND must NOT delete from the device. Two categories: (1) host-only repo metadata that has no business on flash; (2) device-local state files that the user creates and edits on the device. CRITICAL: each entry MUST start with '/' -- ugit compares against absolute device paths like '/settings.json', so a bare 'settings.json' will NOT match and the file will be deleted on the next pull. ugit auto-protects /ugit.py, /config.json, /ugit.backup, /ugit_log.txt, /lib, /sd already; those don't need listing.
